name: harmonyos-skills
description: HarmonyOS NEXT offline reference library: 12000+ Markdown docs (releases / guides / API references / best practices / FAQs) for AI coding assistants.

interface.longDescription: Offline mirror of Huawei HarmonyOS NEXT developer documentation (12215 docs). AI assistants grep the INDEX, then Read only the matched .md to answer ArkTS / ArkUI / API / best-practice questions with citations.
defaultPrompt: 我在做 HarmonyOS NEXT 应用，UIAbility 的生命周期回调有哪些？
ArkTS 中能用 any 类型吗？
